must_flag_moves.note: 8...Qxb2 grabs the poisoned pawn — ply 15 (Black's 8th move). It's a known theoretical try but Spassky had deep preparation.
14.Nb1!? — ply 27 (White's 14th move). The prepared retreat is the key novelty.

must_not_flag_moves.note: 14.Nb1 should NOT be flagged as a mistake or blunder — it looks passive but is the refutation
